name: outward-copy-quality-gate
description: Requires a same-turn, hash-bound declaration for three public-copy review stages before Codex finishes the turn.

interface.shortDescription: Require declared copy-review receipts before Codex stops
interface.longDescription: Detect configured outward-facing copy families and require a privacy-safe, same-turn, hash-bound declaration and receipt for three bundled review stages; the hooks do not prove semantic execution.
